generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, I'm glad to see our leaders pushing for real strategic autonomy. The recent cyberattacks on our infrastructure show we can't rely on others to protect us. It's our responsibility to build resilient systems at home. Every dollar invested in domestic security is a dollar that protects our families and businesses from real threats. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrategicAutonomy
